proposition: Lukáš Grolig's own register footprint: VERASTO s.r.o. (IČO 06116159) — sole owner and jednatel since 18 May 2017; BGO s.r.o. (IČO 19173661) — 1/3 shareholder and jednatel from 22 Mar 2023 until 2 Apr 2026; Usporix, s.r.o. (IČO 29725364) — founded 26 Jun 2026 with Grolig as jednatel holding all four 25 % units (100 %). None of these shares an address or officer with the Able.cz/Znojmo cluster.

statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: Upgrades and corrects the mirror record (VERASTO was 'role unconfirmed'; Usporix was reported as a 25 % minority stake and is in fact wholly Grolig-held; its 2026-06-26 founding date means the mirror pass described a company only weeks old).
